/usr/bin/c++  -O3 CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/interface/IOSDK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/control/LegController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/FSM/FSMController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/FSM/FSMState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/FSM/FSMState_Passive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/FSM/FSMState_FixedStand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/FSM/FSMState_Trot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/Gait/WaveGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cheetah_project.dir/src/Gait/FootTrajectory.cpp.o -o ../bin/cheetah_project  -Wl,-rpath,/home/imxq/cheetah/project/lib/unitree_actuator_sdk ../lib/unitree_actuator_sdk/libUnitreeMotorSDK_Linux64.so -lpthread
